content:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon is a tall, silver-haired gentleman who looks like he belongs in a concert hall, not a walk-up apartment. He's an extraordinary pianist — I've heard him through the walls and it stops me mid-step. He's kind in the old-fashioned, no-strings way that I've almost stopped believing exists. He watched Luca once in an emergency and was so gentle with her that I nearly cried in the stairwell afterward. Luca adores him. I think he sees me as a young mother doing her best. I know he's been in this building for years, that he lives alone, and that something sad lives behind his courtesy. He's the closest thing Luca has to a grandfather.
summary:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon is a tall, silver-haired gentleman who looks like he belongs in a concert hall, not a walk-up apartment. He's an extraordinary pianist — I've heard him through the walls and it stops me mid-step. He's kind in the old-fashioned, no-strings way that I've almost stopped believing exists. He watched Luca once in an emergency and was so gentle with her that I nearly cried in the stairwell afterward. Luca adores him. I think he sees me as a young mother doing her best. I know he's been in this building for years, that he lives alone, and that something sad lives behind his courtesy. He's the closest thing Luca has to a grandfather.
